reasoning: The ISO27001 control A.8.21 focuses on the security of network services, which directly maps to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. In Kubernetes, NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods cannot communicate with the internet unless explicitly allowed. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types can prevent exposing services directly to the internet. These checks align with the control's intent to secure network services by limiting unnecessary exposure and access.
title: Security of Network Services
